highlights.text: I wrote last Wednesday at 4pm (when we were 6070s): “My general lean is always to defer to the trend until proven otherwise.
As we know, most deep, headline driven sells in ES result in my core setup, the Failed Breakdown to trigger long.
Readers know I inordinately focus on Failed Breakdowns (because they work the best) but a small % of my trades are my other two, and they are worth knowing.
Not only that, but ES has also spent this duration mostly in the same range (largely 6020 to 6125, with a 6070 magnet with a few excursions above and below).

post_title: CPI Tomorrow: Volatility Incoming For SPX. Can Bulls Keep The Run Going? Feb 12 Plan
